activation_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Stage F Activation walks an approved envelope into the live operating state — every step is human-authorized, audit-emitted, and reversible by construction.
activation_defaults.model_usage_notes: Activation plans are DESIGN_NOT_EXECUTED. Real activation requires a future implementation slice that consumes this catalog. Every step in the catalog is the canonical projection a future runtime activation engine will follow.
audit_expectations: future ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED + per-step audit literals at the implementation slice

activation_plan.name: Team Activation Plan
activation_plan.description: Canonical ordered sequence to activate the Team Starter Envelope (envelope.team.v1). Walks a team-scoped envelope at the Foundation runtime tier — baseline DMW + team-scoped DMW grants + Slack read-first connector binding (per C2 OPERATING per Foundation PR #185) + Stage 2 workflow templates (template-only at this design tier; runtime promotion at W4 forward-substrate) + team-scoped role assignments. Every step is human-authorized and audit-emitted. Slack connector binding registration is structurally enabled but requires Founder authorization of the env-var-resolved bot token at the deployment register.
activation_plan.human_readable_summary: Team-scope activation: baseline + team DMW, register Slack read-first binding, assign template + team roles, register Stage 2 templates. Slack binding LANDABLE today per C2. Every step reversible via soft-delete.
activation_plan.model_usage_notes: Use this plan for the Team plan tier. Slack binding registration is the canonical extension over Starter / Pilot — the binding row is persisted with secret_ref env-var-NAME only (never the resolved token). Stage 2 workflow templates remain in TEMPLATE_ONLY register at activation tier; Stage 3 runtime promotion requires a separate W4 slice.

activation_steps.step_name: Precondition check: envelope in DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED state
activation_steps.step_purpose: Verify the consumed Starter Envelope has not been previously activated and that the org_entity_id has admin capabilities (can_admin_org) at the caller tier.
postconditions: precheck_passed == true OR activation aborted with PRECHECK_FAILED
activation_steps.rollback_path: No-op (precheck is read-only; no mutation occurred)

activation_steps.step_name: Open baseline DMW scope for org_entity_id
activation_steps.step_purpose: Activate the baseline DMW per ADR-0001 + the canonical 'DMW baseline always included at base' doctrine.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: DMW baseline grant (persists in capsule.wallet_id binding for org)
preconditions: no existing DMW baseline grant for org_entity_id
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete the DMW baseline grant row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:DMW_BASELINE_REVOKED

activation_steps.step_name: Extend DMW scope to team-scoped memory
activation_steps.step_purpose: Add team-scoped DMW extension on top of the baseline. Self-scoped memory + team-scoped memory; customer/project scopes remain forbidden at this tier per envelope DMW_scope_ceiling.
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete the team-scope extension row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:DMW_TEAM_SCOPE_REVOKED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register Wave 2.1 DEEP role templates scoped to the team. Maps to the team plan's seat count from the B2 ledger.
postconditions: role assignments LIVE; team-scope enforced at every assignment
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete each role assignment row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:ROLE_TEMPLATE_UNASSIGNED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register a SLACK_READ ConnectorBinding (per Foundation PR #185 C2 OPERATING). The binding persists with secret_ref env-var-NAME only; the resolved bot token is never persisted or echoed. Fixture-first defensive triple gate preserved at the runtime tier.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: ConnectorBinding row (type: SLACK_READ; enabled: true; use_real: false at activation tier — Founder authorizes real-mode flip at deployment register)
preconditions: Team plan's B4 capability pack entitlement includes slack-read
postconditions: SLACK_READ binding LIVE in org_connectors; secret_ref env-var-NAME stored; resolved value NEVER persisted
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete the connector binding row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:CONNECTOR_BINDING_REVOKED

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register Stage 2 workflow templates from the W3 catalog. Per ADR-0081 §2.2: Stage 2 cannot execute; templates are visible for the runtime promotion gate at W4. Stage 1 templates remain available.
activation_steps.produces_runtime_object: Workflow template registrations (Stage 1 + Stage 2; all TEMPLATE_ONLY)
postconditions: Stage 1 + Stage 2 templates LIVE; workflow_state remains TEMPLATE_ONLY for every template
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete each workflow template row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_UNREGISTERED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Register the team-tier aha-moment surface — first-week activation hints that consume the Slack read-first binding + safe-fallback paths.
postconditions: Slack-bound + safe-fallback aha moments visible to assigned team roles
activation_steps.rollback_path: Soft-delete each aha-moment registration row (RULE 10); emit ADMIN_ACTION:AHA_MOMENT_UNREGISTERED per row

activation_steps.step_purpose: Transition envelope_state from DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED to ACTIVATED. Final state-flip step; emit STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED with full step-by-step lineage in audit details.
postconditions: envelope.envelope_state == 'ACTIVATED'; activation_lineage row persisted with step-by-step audit_event_id references
activation_steps.rollback_path: If state-flip fails, walk steps 7 → 1 in reverse order calling each step's rollback_path; emit ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK at completion

audit_expectations: Every step emits exactly one audit literal BEFORE the underlying mutation per RULE 4
Every rollback emits an inverse audit literal AFTER the soft-delete row update
STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED audit details include the ordered audit_event_id list from steps 1-7
Failed activation emits STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK + the failed step_id + the partial step lineage
Connector binding registration audit details NEVER include the resolved env-var VALUE — only the env-var NAME

rollback_steps: On any step failure, walk preceding steps in reverse order
Each step's rollback_path is called; each emits the per-step inverse audit literal
Final rollback emits STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATION_ROLLED_BACK with the failed step_id and partial lineage
No row is hard-deleted (RULE 10); every rollback sets deleted_at timestamps
Connector binding rollback NEVER attempts to revoke the underlying Slack bot token at the third-party tier — that is the operator's responsibility outside the activation plan
rollback_strategy.reversibility_guarantee: Activation is fully reversible by construction. The activation_lineage row + per-step audit chain preserves the full forward history; rollback preserves the full backward history. A re-activation attempt is a fresh activation plan, not a re-attempt of a previously-failed plan.

human_authorization_points.authorization_purpose: Confirm the envelope is ready to activate (D5 envelope_state DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED + D4 governance reviews complete). Required before step 1 precheck fires.
Confirm opening the baseline DMW scope for the org. Required before step 2 fires.
Confirm registering the Slack read-first binding (env-var-NAME secret_ref; never resolved value). Required before step 5 fires.
Confirm the state-flip from DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED to ACTIVATED. Required before step 8 fires.

safe_defaults: Every step emits audit BEFORE the underlying mutation (RULE 4)
Every step's rollback_path is reversible via soft-delete (RULE 10)
No autonomous activation; every gate requires explicit human authorization
Slack binding registered with use_real: false at activation tier; Founder authorizes real-mode flip separately at deployment register
Stage 2 templates remain TEMPLATE_ONLY at activation tier; runtime promotion requires W4 slice
Envelope ownership boundary preserved (caller org == envelope org)
Activation is single-cycle; concurrent activation attempts rejected at step 1 precheck
Connector binding secret_ref env-var-NAME only; resolved env-var VALUE never persisted, echoed, or audited
forbidden_defaults: Auto-activation without ORG_ADMIN authorization is forbidden
Cross-tenant activation (caller activates another org's envelope) is forbidden
Hard-delete of any activation row is forbidden (RULE 10)
Skipping any step is forbidden — activation is all-or-nothing per plan
Re-attempting a failed activation in-place is forbidden — a fresh plan instance is required
Audit emission AFTER mutation is forbidden — audit fires BEFORE per RULE 4
Resolved env-var VALUE in any audit detail, response body, log line, or persisted row is absolutely forbidden
Auto-flip to use_real: true at activation tier is forbidden — Founder authorizes real-mode separately
forbidden_consumers: AGENT_TWIN_AUTONOMOUS_ACTIVATION — autonomous activation is absolutely forbidden
AGENT_TWIN_CROSS_TENANT — cross-tenant activation is absolutely forbidden
MANAGER_SURVEILLANCE_TOOL — this plan must never be used to enable employee monitoring
EMPLOYEE_SCORING_TOOL — this plan must never be used to produce employee score
EXTERNAL_THIRD_PARTY_UNAUTHORIZED — third parties must not consume activation plans
